title: Don't Chase Fame, Do THIS Instead (Ryan Holiday's Advice)
summary: A brief discussion about the dangers of pursuing fame as a goal rather than focusing on craft and creativity. The conversation critiques how social media has made fame seem like an end in itself rather than a byproduct of meaningful work.

key_claims.claim: Social media has a homogenization effect on people
Fame is the excrement of creativity - a byproduct that comes out of the creative process
Social media has made fame itself seem like a goal rather than a byproduct of mastering a craft
